# pangolin_users (Data Source)

Retrieves the list of users for the organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pangolin_users" "all" {}

output "user_emails" {
  value = [for u in data.pangolin_users.all.users : u.email]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `users` (Attributes List) List of users. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--users))

<a id="nestedatt--users"></a>
### Nested Schema for `users`

Read-Only:

- `email` (String) The user email address.
- `id` (String) The user ID.
